a.xlink:title: customer_db.party Generic party record owned by customer-service.
customer_db.natural_person Natural person details for a party.
customer_db.customer Bank customer aggregate persisted by customer-service.

customer_db.contact_point Contact channels associated with a party.

account_db.account_status_history Audit trail for account status transitions.
account_db.account_number_sequence Local sequence used to generate account numbers.
account_db.account_idempotency Durable account opening idempotency record.
